title: Data schema — compaction-redesign
description: Canonical type contracts for the redesigned compaction subsystem (Memory, Anchor, Cooldown, run() entry point).

SessionMemory.description: Per-session memory artifact. Single Storage path: session_memory/<sessionID>. Replaces SharedContext.Space and rebind-checkpoint disk file.

version.description: monotonic counter; bumps on every successful append/update

updatedAt.description: epoch milliseconds of most recent update

turnSummaries.description: per-turn AI self-summaries captured at runloop exit; primary narrative content

fileIndex.description: auxiliary file metadata (read/edit/write history); subset of legacy SharedContext.files

actionLog.description: auxiliary action one-liners (bash, grep, glob, task); subset of legacy SharedContext.actions

lastCompactedAt.description: cooldown source-of-truth; null until first compaction

round.description: runloop step value when last compaction succeeded

rawTailBudget.description: max raw rounds preserved as crash-recovery fallback; default 5

TurnSummary.description: AI's natural turn-end self-summary; captured at runloop exit (DD-2)

turnIndex.description: ordinal of this turn within the session, starting at 0

userMessageId.description: id of the user message that initiated this turn

assistantMessageId.description: id of the assistant message whose final text was captured

text.description: AI-written final text part; the narrative summary itself

accountId.description: account that produced the summary, if known

tokens.description: token accounting for the summary text itself

FileEntry.description: auxiliary file metadata; not the primary memory content

ActionEntry.description: auxiliary one-liner of a tool invocation

Anchor.description: compaction boundary marker; lives in the session message stream as an assistant message with summary:true and a part of type 'compaction'

messageId.description: id of the assistant summary message

summaryText.description: the narrative summary content (= renderForLLM output at the time of compaction)

providerId.description: provider active when this anchor was written

modelID.description: model active when this anchor was written

kind.description: which compaction kind produced this anchor

auto.description: whether the trigger permitted synthetic-Continue injection

observed.description: what observable condition triggered this run; log/event attribution

intent.description: only meaningful for observed=manual; rich skips kinds 1-3 and goes to llm-agent

RunResult.description: continue = next runloop iteration may proceed to LLM call; stop = exit runloop

available.description: predicate name evaluated against current state to decide if this step can run

rootEntities.description: top-level data entities introduced by this redesign
